gate_purpose.description: Final post-foundation gate that verifies all providers have achieved RUNTIME_PASS status
gate_functions: Post-Foundation Gate: Explicitly post-foundation, not part of foundation completion
Runtime Verification: Verifies all providers have real runtime proof
Gap Closure: Requires all provider runtime gaps to be resolved
Evidence Validation: Requires all provider evidence to be valid
Honest Status: Requires honest status assignments without exaggeration

required_pre_conditions.pffg_001: Foundation Final Gate Reader must PASS
required_pre_conditions.pffg_002: Foundation Final Report must be generated
required_pre_conditions.all_provider_evidence: All provider evidence must exist and be valid
required_pre_conditions.provider_matrix: Provider Runtime Matrix must be generated
required_pre_conditions.no_runtime_gaps: All provider runtime gaps must be resolved

rule_1_all_providers_runtime_pass.description: All providers must have RUNTIME_PASS status
validation: Verify all providers have RUNTIME_PASS status
Check no providers have non-RUNTIME_PASS status
Verify runtime status assignments are honest
failure_conditions: Runtime status assignment is not honest

rule_2_real_runtime_evidence.description: All RUNTIME_PASS providers must have real runtime evidence
validation: Load evidence for each RUNTIME_PASS provider
Verify evidence contains real runtime proof
Check evidence is not stub/fake/simulator/state-only/log-only proof

rule_3_environment_availability.description: All providers must have required environment available
validation: Verify environment is available for each provider
Check no providers have BLOCKED_ENV status
Check no test harness claimed as real environment
failure_conditions: Test harness claimed as real environment

rule_4_evidence_schema_compliance.description: All provider evidence must validate against p2-evidence-v8 schema

rule_5_redline_compliance.description: No forbidden terms or premature claims in provider evidence
validation: Scan provider evidence for 32 forbidden terms

rule_6_antifake_compliance.description: No stub/fake/simulator proof claimed as real runtime
validation: Check no state-only or log-only proof
Verify no test harness claimed as real environment
failure_conditions: Test harness claimed as real environment
No real runtime evidence for RUNTIME_PASS claims

step_1_pre_condition_validation: Check Foundation Gates: Verify PFFG-001 and PFFG-002 passed
Load Provider Matrix: Load PMX-001 evidence
Load Honesty Gate: Load PMX-002 evidence
Verify Matrix Generation: Check matrix generated successfully
Verify Honesty Gate: Check honesty gate passed
step_2_provider_status_validation: Load All Provider Evidence: Load evidence for all providers
Check Runtime Status: Check each provider's runtime status
Verify RUNTIME_PASS: Verify all providers have RUNTIME_PASS
Check Status Conflicts: Check no status conflicts
Validate Status Assignments: Validate honest status assignments
step_3_runtime_evidence_validation: Load Evidence Content: Load evidence content for each provider
Check Real Runtime Proof: Check evidence contains real runtime proof
Verify No Fake Proof: Verify no stub/fake/simulator proof
Check Evidence Timestamps: Check evidence timestamps are recent
Validate Evidence Schema: Validate evidence against schema
step_4_environment_validation: Check Environment Requirements: Check each provider's environment requirements
Verify Environment Available: Verify environment is available
Check No BLOCKED_ENV: Check no providers have BLOCKED_ENV status
Validate Environment Claims: Validate environment claims are honest
Check No Test Harness Claims: Check no test harness claimed as real environment
step_5_redline_compliance_check: Scan Provider Evidence: Scan all provider evidence for forbidden terms
Check Premature Claims: Check for premature completion claims
Verify Claim Vocabulary: Verify claim vocabulary compliance
Check False Runtime Claims: Check for false runtime claims
Validate Report/Source Conflicts: Validate no report/source conflicts
step_6_antifake_compliance_check: Scan for Fake Claims: Scan evidence for stub/fake/simulator
Check Runtime Proof: Verify real runtime evidence present
Detect State-only Proof: Check for state-only or log-only proof
Verify Environment Claims: Check test harness not claimed as real
Validate Evidence Quality: Verify evidence quality meets requirements
step_7_gate_decision: Aggregate Results: Aggregate all validation results
Determine Gate Pass/Fail: Determine overall gate result
Identify Remediation: Identify required remediation actions
Generate Gate Summary: Generate gate summary report
Record Gate Decision: Record gate decision in evidence

foundation_final_gate_reader: Requires Foundation Final Gate Reader passed
Requires no provider runtime gaps in foundation
foundation_final_report: Requires report lists all provider runtime gaps
inspector_integration: Reports all providers runtime verified gate status
decision_ledger_integration: Records all providers runtime verified gate decision

positive_test_cases: All providers have RUNTIME_PASS status
All providers have real runtime evidence
All providers have required environment available
All evidence validates against schema
No forbidden terms found in evidence
No premature completion claims
No stub/fake/simulator proof claimed as runtime
All evidence timestamps recent
No status conflicts between evidence and source
All providers runtime verified claim allowed
negative_test_cases: Any provider lacks real runtime evidence
Status conflict between evidence and source
All providers runtime verified claim not allowed

current_gate_status.honest_disclaimer: This is a GATE DEFINITION (CONTRACT_PASS), NOT a runtime claim. All 22 providers currently lack real runtime proof. P2 Foundation (planning/docs/contracts) is COMPLETE. All Providers Runtime Verified is explicitly POST-FOUNDATION and requires each provider to achieve RUNTIME_PASS with real hardware/dependencies/accounts.

gate_integration: PMX-002: Matrix Honesty Gate validates matrix
PFFG-001: Foundation Final Gate Reader reads all evidence
APRV-001: All Providers Runtime Verified Gate verifies all providers

important_notes.post_foundation_gate: This gate is explicitly post-foundation. It is NOT part of P2 Foundation completion.
important_notes.runtime_verification_required: This gate requires real runtime verification, not just contract verification.
important_notes.gap_closure_required: This gate requires all provider runtime gaps to be resolved.
important_notes.honest_status_required: This gate requires honest status assignments. No exaggeration or false claims allowed.
important_notes.static_json_is_not_runtime_proof: Evidence JSON files in artifacts/p2/evidence/ are STATIC planning evidence (CONTRACT_PASS). They document what SHOULD be verified at runtime. They are NOT runtime proof. Real runtime evidence must be generated by CI/CD or local runners with real hardware/accounts/dependencies, and must be timestamped with actual test output.
